zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Agnes Lydiard於1415年出生在英國奧可福爾時，她的父親John Lydiard20歲，母親Clemence St. John10歲。她與Richard De Hyde結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年5月29日在英國英格蘭波克夏丹華斯享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lydiard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Liddiard
meanings: English: habitational name from one of a number of places: two in Wiltshire, Lydiard Millicent and Lydiard Tregose; and two in Somerset, Bishop's Lydeard and Lydeard Saint Lawrence. The placenames derive from a British name composed of garth ‘hill or ridge’, and an uncertain first element, possibly lēd ‘gray’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Agnes Lydiard was born in 1415, in Oxfordshire, England, her father, John Lydiard, was 20 and her mother, Clemence St. John, was 10. She married Richard De Hyde. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 29 May 1468, in Denchworth, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Richard De Hyde. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1468, à Denchworth, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Denchworth, Vale of White Horse District: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Agnes Lydiard(이)가 1415년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Lydiard(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clemence St. John(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 Richard De Hyde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 덴ch워스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Agnes Lydiard родилась в 1415 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Lydiard было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Clemence St. John, 10. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Hyde. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 29 мая 1468 г. в местности денчворт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
